units.content: source code structure: domain-agnostic evaluation framework with property registration, batch ingestion, two-pass analysis, cross-validation, report generation, and control framework
the framework processes domain-specific pipelines into standardized DataEntry objects which are ingested, analyzed through multiple passes, and reported
PropertyDefinition dataclass defines property metadata including thresholds, circularity, speciation exclusion, units, and envelope parameters
DataEntry contains target, property, value, source, instrument, method, sigma, and metadata fields for measurement/prediction records
ingest_dataset() creates Universe entities for targets and instruments, then records measurements or predictions from DataEntry list
run_evaluation() performs two passes of coupling convergence analysis: pass1 filters for measurements only, pass2 uses all data
run_evaluation() analyzes prediction consensus, aggregates trust weights from event history, profiles measurers, detects speciation, and checks validation coverage
the two-pass design distinguishes measurement-only convergence from convergence including predictions, enabling comparative analysis
cross_validate_populations() matches speciation results to convergence data and groups populations by metadata field to compute composition and purity
generate_report() summarizes convergence by property status, counts prediction consensus outcomes (confirmed/refuted/untested), and profiles measurers
generate_report() includes speciation results with BIC deltas and population statistics, plus validation warnings
ControlExpectation and ControlResult dataclasses structure verification of actual outcomes against expected convergence/speciation states
